target_name: Paper 12 (LLM L1-L5) — Model List Includes Together.ai
context: Paper 12 claims L1-L5 routing: Llama 3.3 70B (L1-L2, Together.ai), Claude Opus (L3-L4, OpenRouter). The models endpoint must expose available providers. Kent Beck: write the test that proves the routing exists. If Together.ai appears in the list, the paper's claim is verified.
